title: OFSI General licence INT/2025/5632740
body: " OFSI General licence INT/2025/5632740 OFSI General licence INT/2025/5632740 Publication notice   On 14 January 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/5632740 under the UK Autonomous Sanctions Regulations listed in Annex 1 of the General Licence, which allows Persons to make funds available to or for the benefit of a UK DP up to the Permitted Maximum in each of the two Months following the date of the UK DP’s designation for the purpose of the UK DP making Permitted Payments. "
